# 🚀 [Feature Title]

## 📝 Summary

A short 1-2 sentence description of what we want to implement.

---

## 🎯 Objective

What problem are we solving or what improvement are we making?

---

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The feature does X
- [ ] The user can Y
- [ ] The system responds Z

---

## 🔧 Technical Tasks

- [ ] Create the model/schema
- [ ] Implement the API endpoint
- [ ] Add tests
- [ ] Document the usage

---

## 🧪 How to Test

1. Step 1 for testing
2. Step 2 for verification
3. Expected result

---

## 🏷️ Suggested Labels

`feature`, `api`, `database`...
